---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new check, capability, or improvement to borromeanRings
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What gap or risk does this address? borromeanRings scales upfront design with risk
(decisions that are hard to change) — explain where this falls.

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it's a new check, describe its contract: what it
asserts, when it fails closed, and what evidence/receipt it produces.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why this one is preferable.

## Fit with the roadmap

See `docs/ROADMAP.md`. Is this v0 scope, or a deferred component? borromeanRings
deliberately does not build deferred components until the current increment is
proven (Lean "extra features" waste).
